ocr.text: In reviewing NVIDIA's geographic revenue mix, it is crucial to highlight the diverse performance across various European
markets. The total estimated units sold in the region stand at a robust 100M, reflecting the strong demand for NVIDIA's cutting-
edge technology. Notably, Spain's contribution is significant, with its revenue from graphics cards amounting to 25M, indicating
a growing market for high-performance gaming and professional applications. Furthermore, Spain's sales of other products
reached an impressive figure, showcasing the breadth of NVIDIA's offerings and their relevance in the local context. In the UK,
the data center segment has shown promising growth, generating revenue of 15M, while overall unit sales are estimated at 40
for this market, underscoring the increasing adoption of AI and cloud computing solutions. Additionally, Portugal's performance
in the graphics cards sector reflects a burgeoning interest in gaming, contributing notably to the overall European revenue mix.
